pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the JDK migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 17 language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 syntax and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific APIs are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the java.version property to 21 to reflect the new target JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures consistency across build plugins and scripts that rely on the java.version property for determining the target runtime environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to version 1.18.34 to ensure compatibility with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may not support Java 21 bytecode generation or annotation processing, leading to compilation errors or runtime failures.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Expand the sealed interface permits list to include new server management command implementations.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.why_exists: Java compiler error: 'sealed' interface must list all direct subclasses in the 'permits' clause; missing classes cause compilation failure.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.before:
public sealed interface BotCommand<R extends CommandResponse>
    permits ListInstancesCommand, VersionCommand, HelpCommand {
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.after:
public sealed interface BotCommand<R extends CommandResponse> permits
    ListInstancesCommand,
    VersionCommand,
    HelpCommand,
    StopInstanceCommand,
    StartInstanceCommand,
    StartServerCommandV2,
    StopServerCommandV2,
    RestartServerCommand,
    StartServerCommand,
    StopServerCommand,
    RebootServerCommand {

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Replace the old Ec2InstanceManager with the refactored Ec2Manager class to align with the new architecture.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.why_exists: The class Ec2InstanceManager was removed or renamed in the refactoring, causing a compile error if the old import and usage are retained.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.after:
import org.github.akarkin1.ec2.Ec2Manager;
Ec2Manager instanceManager = new Ec2Manager(clientProvider);
